overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a futuristic sports car driving through Night City. The vehicle navigates from an open plaza through neon-lit streets, covered highways, and narrow alleys in a rain-soaked urban environment with heavy neon signage and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with shops and debris

events.description: car turns right from plaza onto main street

agents.ego_description: driving futuristic sports car through plaza and turning onto main road, passing pedestrians and shop fronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking on sidewalk near debris

entered.detail: sleek black sports car with pink neon underglow and illuminated rear grille
large digital billboard displaying animated advertisements above the street
storefront with yellow signage reading 'Worry-Free' and red interior lighting
scattered trash bags and discarded items along the sidewalk
massive concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structure
neon sign shaped like a palm tree with purple and pink lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a neon-lit urban plaza with a futuristic sports car positioned among debris and shop fronts. The vehicle drives forward past a 'Worry-Free' shop and neon palm sign, then executes a right turn onto a main street. Sparse pedestrians walk along the sidewalks as the car transitions from the open plaza to the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway with elevated overpasses

agents.ego_description: cruising along main road with moderate traffic, maintaining speed with other vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving in adjacent lane, parallel to ego vehicle
black car ahead in traffic, moving same direction

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with multiple levels and support columns
construction barriers with red and white stripes lining the road edge
white futuristic sedan driving alongside
tall buildings with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The car drives along a multi-lane urban highway beneath elevated overpasses. Other vehicles including a white sedan and black car share the road. Red and white traffic barriers line the right side of the street. The environment transitions from the plaza to a more open highway setting with commercial buildings visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition into covered highway underpass with graffiti walls

events.description: entering covered highway underpass with concrete pillars and graffiti

agents.ego_description: driving under elevated highway structure with graffiti-covered walls, approaching tunnel entrance

entered.detail: enclosed highway structure with roof covering the roadway
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
thick support columns with graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from open highway to a semi-covered underpass. Graffiti-covered concrete walls and support pillars line the left side of the road. The sky becomes mostly obscured as the car approaches the tunnel entrance. The white sedan that was alongside moves ahead into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered tunnel with red neon lighting and commercial signage

events.description: tunnel lighting shifts to dominant red neon glow from overhead fixtures

agents.ego_description: navigating through enclosed tunnel with neon-lit walls and reduced visibility

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle driving ahead in tunnel, visible through windshield

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed pipes and neon light fixtures
illuminated sign with 'Fuyutsuki' text in red neon
overhead neon tubes casting red glow throughout the tunnel
smooth concrete tunnel walls with occasional signage

segments.scene_description: The car drives through a fully enclosed tunnel illuminated by red neon lights. The 'Fuyutsuki' sign appears on the right wall. The environment is narrow and enclosed with concrete walls and ceiling. A distant vehicle is visible ahead in the tunnel. The lighting creates a dramatic red glow on the wet asphalt surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with coffee shops and large billboards

events.description: exiting covered tunnel back to open street with commercial storefronts and billboards

agents.ego_description: driving past storefronts including coffee shop and billboards, preparing to turn

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on sidewalk near yellow stairs

entered.detail: storefront sign reading 'MATAPANG COFFEE' in orange letters
large digital billboards displaying 'CIRKUS' and other advertisements
purple-lit vending machines on the sidewalk
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street
bright yellow staircase leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the tunnel into a commercial district with the 'Matapang Coffee' shop and large 'CIRKUS' billboards visible. The environment opens up to the sky again. The car drives past vending machines and a yellow staircase while a pedestrian walks on the right sidewalk. The car begins a right turn toward a narrower alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with dead end and dumpster

events.description: car turns left into narrow alley and slows to stop

agents.ego_description: maneuvering into narrow alley and coming to a stop near the dead end

entered.detail: tall concrete walls of adjacent buildings creating narrow corridor
purple dumpster with graffiti against the left wall
solid concrete wall blocking the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The car turns left into a narrow service alley with high concrete walls on both sides. A purple dumpster sits against the left wall. The vehicle slows and comes to a stop facing a dead-end wall at the alley's terminus. The lighting is dim and enclosed, creating a secluded parking spot away from the main street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a futuristic sports car travels from a vibrant neon plaza through a series of urban conduits and finally into a secluded alley. It begins by driving past a neon palm sign and shop fronts in an open plaza before turning onto a multi-lane highway flanked by traffic barriers and other vehicles. As the road narrows, the scene shifts from the open sky to a semi-covered underpass with graffiti-covered pillars, eventually plunging into a fully enclosed tunnel bathed in a dramatic red neon glow. The vehicle then exits the tunnel back into a commercial district filled with large billboards and coffee shops before turning away from the main street. Finally, the camera follows the car as it enters a dim, narrow service alley with high concrete walls, coming to a complete stop against a dead-end wall.
